heroHeadline: Russia Threatens Baltic NATO States Over Ukrainian Drone Transit as Easter Truce Talks Continue
heroSubtitle: Moscow warns Estonia, Latvia, and Lithuania of consequences if Ukrainian drones originate from or transit their territory, escalating confrontation with NATO's northeastern flank
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
